productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Blue Cropped Denim Shorts
description: Style NoteIf you're a denim person, these denim shorts from jealous 21 will delight you. Designed to contour the hips and Fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time - you might not want to take these off once you pull them on. They go perfectly with your t-shirts. Style this tastefully with flip flops or sports shoesProduct DetailsBlue cropped shorts with a fold over detail at the hem, has a broad waist band with belt loops, two insert pockets on the front with a small coin pocket on the right, two patch pockets at the back with metallic studs, brand patch on the back at the waistband and a slightly crumpled look with a button and zip closure on the frontMaterial and Care99.3% cotton and 0.7% spandexMachine or hand wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitJealous 21's ultra slim FitThe model (height 5'8'' and waist 28'') is wearing a size 28
